harness_fix.before: random int64 in [0, 30000) for every integer input
harness_fix.bug_signature: onnxruntime Gather bounds check: 'indices element out of data bounds, idx=18968 must be within the inclusive range [-2,1]' at /bert/embeddings/token_type_embeddings/Gather on BERT-large (opset 17)
harness_fix.latent_for: bert-squad-10 (opset 10) tolerated out-of-range indices silently but still produced garbage for attention_mask semantics
